name: @card-notes-app/electron

scripts.package: npm run prepare:backend-runtime && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --config electron-builder.json --win nsis --publish never
scripts.package:release: npm run prepare:backend-runtime && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --config electron-builder.json --win nsis --publish always
scripts.package:dir: npm run prepare:backend-runtime && node ./scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --config electron-builder.json --win dir --publish never

description: Electron shell for the Card Notes App.
author: Card Notes App
